context_text: The flowers had been too strong for the huge beast and he had given up at last, and fallen only a short distance from the end of the poppy bed, where the sweet grass spread in beautiful green fields before them.

subject: the great fields

context_text: Soon they rolled the Lion out of the poppy bed to the great fields, where he could breathe the sweet, fresh air again, instead of the poisonous scent of the flowers.
normalized_context_text: Soon they rolled the Lion out of the poppy bed to the great fields, where he could breathe the sweet, fresh air again, instead of the poisonous scent of the flowers.

subject: the great fields

context_text: "If ever you need us again," she said, "come out into the great fields and call, and we shall hear you and come to your assistance.
normalized_context_text: "If ever you need us again," she said, "come out into the great fields and call, and we shall hear you and come to your assistance.

subject: the great fields

context_text: But at noon, when the sun was over their heads, they did not know which was east and which was west, and that was the reason they were lost in the great fields.
normalized_context_text: But at noon, when the sun was over their heads, they did not know which was east and which was west, and that was the reason they were lost in the great fields.

subject: the great fields

context_text: There was field upon field of ripening grain, with well-paved roads running between, and pretty rippling brooks with strong bridges across them.
normalized_context_text: There was field upon field of ripening grain, with well-paved roads running between, and pretty rippling brooks with strong bridges across them.

subject: the great fields

context_text: Thanking the good woman, they started afresh and walked by the great fields and across the pretty bridges until they saw before them a very beautiful Castle.
